mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ENTRPRS_MBER ( ENTRPRS_MBER_ID , ENTRPRS_SE_CODE , BIZRNO , JURIRNO , CMPNY_NM , CXFC , ZIP , ADRES , FXNUM , INDUTY_CODE , APPLCNT_NM , APPLCNT_IHIDNUM , SBSCRB_DE , ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_HINT , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_CNSR , GROUP_ID , DETAIL_ADRES , APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES , TELNO , ESNTL_ID , FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID ) VALUES ( #{entrprsMberId}, #{entrprsSeCode}, #{bizrno}, #{jurirno}, #{cmpnyNm}, #{cxfc}, #{zip}, #{adres}, #{fxnum}, #{indutyCode}, #{applcntNm}, #{applcntIhidnum}, sysdate(), #{entrprsMberSttus}, #{entrprsMberPassword}, #{entrprsMberPasswordHint}, #{entrprsMberPasswordCnsr}, #{groupId}, #{detailAdres}, #{applcntEmailAdres}, #{telno}, #{uniqId}, sysdate(), #{entrprsMberId} )
mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID = #{stplatId}

SELECT COUNT(1) usedCnt FROM ( SELECT EMPLYR_ID userId FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO UNION ALL SELECT ENTRPRS_MBER_ID userId FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER UNION ALL SELECT MBER_ID userId FROM TB_GNRL_MBER ) A WHERE userId = #{checkId}
